name: Jazz Dance Fundamentals VR
summary: 🌿 Jazz Dance Fundamentals VR  Learn jazz dance fundamentals in VR using hands-free, controller-free motion tracking. Build technique, rhythm, and coordination through structured step-by-step training with a 3D instructor.  🌀 Motion Trails show hand and foot paths for precise learning 🐼 Slow motion replay ⏩ fast forward & rewind 👀 Interactive 3D instructor for all angles 🌄 20+ immersive environments with music  Learn clearly. Move confidently.
